Features

Everything You Need

Powerful features designed for modern clinics. From patient management to billing, we've got you covered.

🏥

Multi-Tenant SaaS

Each clinic gets isolated data with shared infrastructure. Scale efficiently while maintaining privacy.

🔐

RBAC Security

Role-based access control with granular permissions. Doctors, receptionists, pharmacists — each sees only what they need.

📅

Smart Scheduling

Calendar view, token system, online booking. Manage doctor schedules and patient appointments effortlessly.

📋

EMR & Prescriptions

Digital health records, vitals tracking, prescriptions. Everything your doctors need at their fingertips.

💊

Pharmacy Management

Stock tracking, expiry alerts, barcode support. Complete pharmacy operations from purchase to sale.

Coming Soon
🧪

Lab Integration

Test ordering, result entry, report generation. Streamline your laboratory workflow.

Coming Soon
💰

Billing & Payments

Auto-invoicing, multiple payment methods, insurance support. Get paid faster with automated billing.

Coming Soon
📊

Analytics & Reports

Revenue reports, patient analytics, doctor performance. Make data-driven decisions for your clinic.

Coming Soon
📱

Patient Portal

Patients can book appointments, view prescriptions, pay bills online. Reduce front desk workload.

Coming Soon
Modules

Comprehensive Modules

Each module is designed to handle specific aspects of clinic operations.

👥

Patient Mgmt

Registration, history, attachments

👨‍⚕️

Doctor Mgmt

Profiles, schedules, leaves

📅

Appointments

Calendar, tokens, reminders

💊

Prescription

Create, print, history

📋

EMR / Visit

Vitals, symptoms, diagnosis

Coming Soon
💰

Billing

Invoices, payments, refunds

Coming Soon
🏪

Pharmacy

Stock, sales, expiry tracking

Coming Soon
🧪

Lab

Tests, results, reports

Coming Soon
📦

Inventory

Items, stock, transfers

Coming Soon
👥

HRMS

Employees, attendance, payroll

Coming Soon
🛏️

Room & Bed

Allocation, admission, discharge

Coming Soon
🔔

Notifications

Email, SMS, push, in-app

Coming Soon
Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your clinic. Upgrade anytime as you grow.

Starter
₹499/month
Perfect for small clinics getting started with digital management.
  • 1 Branch
  • 5 Users
  • 500 Patients
  • Patient Management
  • Appointments
  • Prescriptions
  • Basic Billing
Get Started
Professional
₹1499/month
For growing clinics that need pharmacy and lab management.
  • 3 Branches
  • 25 Users
  • 5,000 Patients
  • Everything in Starter
  • Pharmacy Module
  • Lab Module
  • HRMS
  • Inventory
Get Started
Enterprise
₹3499/month
For hospital networks needing advanced features and API access.
  • Unlimited Branches
  • Unlimited Users
  • Unlimited Patients
  • Everything in Professional
  • Room & Bed Management
  • Telemedicine
  • API Access
  • WhatsApp Integration
Contact Sales
